comments.author: reader
comments.text:
We can't have silent failures like this. Directory moves happen all the time in projects. If moving test files to another directory suddenly causes us to lose test coverage without us noticing it, that's a problem we need to address.

We should be running tests frequently enough to know when things change.

comments.author: reader
comments.text: Under a regime where tricks work, we don't invent terms like "stuck-state recovery". Getting stuck is a normal part of the game. That's exactly when you DO complete your turn.
